# Copilot Instructions — Convergio

Read `AGENTS.md` in the repo root for ALL rules.
Read `MISSION.md` for what to do.
Read `WORKSPACE-SPLIT.md` for full project status.

## Quick rules

- Max 250 lines per file
- Conventional commits (feat:, fix:, docs:)
- Worktree isolation: never work on main
- cargo check + cargo test + cargo fmt before commit
- Every feature must close the loop end-to-end (Rule 10 in AGENTS.md)
- Answer the 4 questions before any task (see AGENTS.md)
